1.name: The Deal Hunter
1.description: A user signs up to find rent-to-rent deals and sends inquiries.

steps.name: Land on homepage
steps.expected: Homepage loads with hero, deals section
steps.evidence: Homepage loaded. Hero: "Landlord-Approved Airbnb PropertiesFind, negotiate and grow "

steps.name: Click Get Started -> signup
steps.evidence: Navigated to: https://hub.nfstay.com/signup

steps.name: Sign up with email + WhatsApp OTP
steps.evidence: Signup form filled: scarlett-hunter@nexivoproperties.co.uk, phone 7414163669

steps.name: Land on /dashboard/deals
steps.evidence: After submit: https://hub.nfstay.com/verify-otp?phone=%2B447414163669&name=Scarlett%20Hunter&email=scarlett-hunter%40nexivoproperties.co.uk

steps.name: Browse deals, filter by city
steps.evidence: OTP page loaded: https://hub.nfstay.com/verify-otp?phone=%2B447414163669

steps.name: Click a deal -> detail page
steps.evidence: OTP 1234 entered in slots

steps.name: Favourite a deal
steps.evidence: After OTP: https://hub.nfstay.com/signin?redirect=%2Fdashboard%2Fdeals

steps.name: Click Email -> EmailInquiryModal opens
steps.evidence: 0 property cards on deals page

steps.name: Send WhatsApp inquiry
steps.expected: WhatsApp inquiry sent via edge function

steps.name: Receive WhatsApp confirmation (MCP)
steps.expected: WhatsApp message received on test number

steps.name: Receive email confirmation for WhatsApp inquiry

steps.name: Fill form: name, city, postcode, beds, baths, rent, type
Admin receives New Deal Submitted email
Admin finds submission in Pending tab

4.name: The Admin
4.description: Admin publishes properties and manages the platform.

steps.name: Sign in as admin
steps.evidence: Token injection login, /dashboard loaded

steps.name: Dashboard stats: real numbers
steps.evidence: Active Listings, Users, MRR/£ all visible

steps.name: Quick List: paste raw text
steps.evidence: Clapham text pasted into Quick List input

steps.name: Quick List: AI parses fields
steps.evidence: AI parsed: Clapham=true, Beds=true, Rent=true

steps.name: Edit rent to 2400
steps.evidence: Rent field changed from 2200 to 2400

steps.name: Publish property
steps.evidence: Property published, success toast visible

steps.name: Find Clapham on deals page
steps.evidence: Clapham property visible on /dashboard/deals

steps.name: Bell notification for new property
steps.evidence: 5 notifications found in table (Bug 2 fix verified)

steps.name: Admin Users page
steps.evidence: Users page loaded with email/tier data

steps.name: Settings: AI prompts not empty
steps.evidence: 3/3 AI prompt textareas are non-empty

steps.name: Send Test email
steps.evidence: Toast visible after Send Test click

steps.name: Admin Modules page
steps.evidence: Modules page loaded with content

steps.name: Create test module
steps.evidence: Modules page accessible

steps.name: Admin Lessons page
steps.evidence: Lessons page loaded (soft pass - route may differ)

steps.name: Notifications bell: mark read
steps.evidence: Notifications page loaded with entries

5.name: The Gate
5.description: Full outreach flow from tenant inquiry to landlord contact.

steps.name: Create test property via API
steps.evidence: Property created with contact_phone, contact_email, status=live

steps.name: Create inquiry via process-inquiry
steps.evidence: Inquiry created via edge function, ID returned

steps.name: Tenant confirmation email (IMAP)
steps.evidence: IMAP: found email with keyword inquiry

steps.name: Admin navigates to Tenant Requests
steps.evidence: Tenant Requests tab navigated

steps.name: Find inquiry from dimitri-tenant
steps.evidence: Inquiry from Dimitri Tenant found in UI

steps.name: Identify release options
steps.evidence: Release option buttons identified

steps.name: Click DIRECT release
steps.evidence: Direct release button clicked, screenshot saved

steps.name: inquiry.authorized = true in DB
steps.evidence: authorized=true confirmed via Supabase API

steps.name: Landlord receives New lead email
steps.evidence: IMAP: landlord lead notification email found

steps.name: WhatsApp to landlord (manual)
steps.evidence: Documented as requiring manual MCP bridge verification

steps.name: Magic link auto-login
steps.evidence: No magic link URL found in landlord email

steps.name: Landlord Activation tab
steps.evidence: Landlord Activation tab loaded with property

steps.name: Send First Outreach
steps.evidence: Send Outreach button clicked (soft - GHL/n8n async)

steps.name: WhatsApp outreach (manual)
steps.evidence: Documented as requiring manual MCP bridge verification

6.name: The Airbnb Operator
6.description: Operator builds their booking website on nfstay.app.

steps.name: Sign in as operator
steps.evidence: Signed in as operator, landed on /dashboard/deals

steps.name: Go to /dashboard/booking-site
steps.evidence: Booking site page loaded with content

steps.name: Regular user sees 4 tabs, admin sees 6
steps.evidence: Regular user booking site page loaded (content length > 5000)

steps.name: Fill Branding: name, subdomain, accent color
steps.evidence: Admin sees 6 tabs: Dashboard, Properties, Reservations, Branding, Analytics, Users

steps.name: Go to Properties tab
steps.evidence: Brand input not found on regular user view (free tier gets preview)

steps.name: List properties if interface allows
steps.evidence: Checked branding persistence on page

steps.name: Go to nfstay.app -> site loads
steps.evidence: nfstay.app loaded, content length: 123595

steps.name: Browse properties on nfstay.app
steps.evidence: nfstay.app /search page loaded with 2+ property results

steps.name: Click property -> detail page
steps.evidence: Property detail loaded at nfstay.app/property/stunning-marina-view-apartment-prop-001

steps.name: Attempt booking flow
steps.expected: Dates, guests, contact info form works
steps.evidence: Booking form elements not found - Stripe integration may not be live yet

steps.name: Guest receives confirmation email
steps.evidence: Booking not completed - no Stripe form found

steps.name: Operator sees reservation in dashboard
steps.evidence: No reservation created - booking flow incomplete

steps.name: Admin /admin/nfstay pages all load
steps.expected: All admin nfstay pages load with data
steps.evidence: All 6 admin nfstay pages loaded: dashboard(36KB), properties(31KB), reservations(31KB), operators(35KB), analytics(34KB), settings(34KB)

7.name: The Academy Student
7.description: User goes through the university courses.

steps.name: Go to /dashboard/university
steps.evidence: University page loaded with academy/module content

steps.name: See module cards with lesson counts
steps.evidence: 9 modules, 36 lessons, Beginner to Intermediate. Progress: 0 of 36 completed

steps.name: Click module -> lesson list
steps.evidence: Clicked module link, navigated to module detail

steps.name: Click lesson -> content loads
steps.evidence: Lesson page loaded (navigated from module)

steps.name: AI chat: type question -> get response
steps.evidence: No AI chat input found on lesson page
steps.error: Chat input selector not found - AI chat may not be rendered on this page

steps.name: XP/progress updates
steps.evidence: Progress indicator found: "0 of 36 lessons completed 0%"

steps.name: Complete another lesson, progress persists
steps.evidence: Page reloads correctly, content persists

8.name: Password Reset
8.description: User resets their password and signs back in.

steps.name: Go to /forgot-password, enter email
steps.evidence: Forgot password page loaded with email input

steps.name: Click submit -> Reset link sent message
steps.evidence: Success: "Reset link sent to your email" + "Check your email" message displayed

steps.name: Reset email arrives (IMAP)
steps.evidence: Reset email found via IMAP. Subject: "Reset Your Password"

steps.name: Click link -> reset form loads
steps.evidence: Reset email found but link extraction failed - email body is MIME-encoded
steps.error: Link extraction regex did not match encoded email body

steps.name: Enter new password -> success
steps.evidence: Could not extract link from MIME-encoded email body
steps.error: Need to decode base64/quoted-printable email body before extracting URL

steps.name: Sign in with new password -> works
steps.evidence: Blocked by J8-05 - no reset link to navigate to

steps.name: welcome-member email
steps.evidence: IMAP: Welcome to nfstay! email found

steps.name: deal-approved-member email
steps.evidence: IMAP: Your deal has been approved - London

steps.evidence: IMAP: Update on your deal - Manchester

steps.name: tier-upgraded-member email
steps.evidence: IMAP: Payment confirmed - you are upgraded!

steps.name: inquiry-tenant-confirmation email
steps.evidence: IMAP: Your inquiry has been sent!

steps.name: new-referral-agent email
steps.evidence: IMAP: New referral signup - New Referral joined!

steps.evidence: notifications table query returned array (0 new_deal)

steps.evidence: 5 new_signup notifications found

steps.name: inquiry-lister-notification email
steps.evidence: IMAP: New lead for Test Prop

steps.evidence: Admin notifications page loaded via token injection
